prompt: Edit image 1 by digitally rendering the hand-drawn UI mockups, applying the light purple color from image 2 as the screen background fill, and using the bright purple color from image 3 for highlights and key interactive elements.
prompt_refined: Edit image 1: Transform the three hand-drawn mobile UI mockups into polished digital designs. For each screen, apply the light purple color from image 2 as the main screen background fill. Utilize the bright purple color from image 3 for all key interactive elements, including buttons, icons, and highlighted text.
objects: Three polished digital mobile UI screens
Text labels (e.g., "Fluttertop", headings, item names, prices)
